subject: [PATCH v4 11/21] zswap: move zswap entry management to the virtual swap descriptor

reviews.author: David Hildenbrand
reviews.summary: Raised concerns about the impact of this change on zswap's performance and suggested further analysis is needed before merging.

2026-03-18.patch_summary: This patch moves zswap entry management from a dedicated tree to the virtual swap descriptor, eliminating lock contention and re-partitioning the zswap pool by virtual swap cluster.
